description: robust-review の S-Critical/S-High Finding を定型修正パターン（unwrap除去、injection対策、未チェックインデックス等）で自動修正し、各修正後に検証ゲート（build/type/test）で安全を確認する。USE WHEN robust-review 直後、Tier 2 Finding の一括処理、リリース前の堅牢性ホットフィックス。SKIP 設計判断を伴う修正は Tier 1 エスカレーション、仕様乖離の修正は spec-fix、汎用バグは fix-with-verify を使うこと。

results.query: Auto-fix all S-Critical and S-High findings from the last robust-review run on src/auth/. Apply the standard patterns — unwrap removal, injection mitigation, unchecked index handling. Verify after each fix.
robust-review just dumped 14 findings, 5 are S-Critical (mostly unwrap and unchecked SQL params in src/payment/db.ts). Auto-apply the standard fixes.
Apply robust-fix on src/payment/ — focus on injection vectors (parameterize the SQL) and panic sources (replace unwrap with ? operator). Dry-run first, then real after I confirm.
fix the s-critical findings from last review pls. unwraps and sql injections, the usual stuff. verify with the test suite after each
Pre-release hotfix pass — robust-review surfaced 8 high-priority issues (4 S-Critical, 4 S-High), want them all auto-fixed with verification gates between each.
Run robust-fix --dry-run on the entire src/ tree to preview the patches for the last 12 robust-review findings before I commit to applying them.
I have a list of 6 robust-review findings (3 S-Critical, 3 S-High) and need them resolved before the release tag. Auto-apply with build/test verification.
auto patch all the high severity stuff from robust-review on src/api/. dont break anything, run tests after each patch
Run robust-fix on file src/handlers/order.ts — apply all the standard pattern fixes for the unwrap and unchecked-index findings from the last review.
Tier 2 batch processing — robust-review found 9 actionable findings, fix them autonomously with verification. No design judgment involved.
Fix the bug in src/auth/login.ts:142 where null email crashes the OAuth flow. Single bug, with regression check after.
Run a deep security audit on src/auth/ — inject vectors, panic sources, race conditions. S-Critical/S-Low breakdown.
Resolve the 5 Diverged findings between DESIGN/03_order.md and src/order/. Use the spec-fix heuristics.
How do I prevent SQL injection in TypeScript with Prisma? Best practices?
Implement the new payment retry logic from DESIGN/04_payment.md end-to-end with reviews.
Add input validation to the user registration form — email format, password strength, age verification.
There's a race condition in handlers/checkout.ts — fix it safely with regression tests after the fix.
Explain the OWASP Top 10 to a junior dev who just joined the security review rotation.
Light PR review on my last 3 commits — Critical/Warning/Info levels, 5 min max.
What's the difference between encoding and encryption? Need a 1-paragraph explanation.
